concerns.text: FR-013 requires documented tie-breaking rules (braid word > DT code) and a validation script. While `tie_breaking_rules.md` is listed in the plan's directory structure, no logic, implementation task, or script generation step is described in plan.md, research.md, or quickstart.md.
SC-006 requires ≥99% of computable invariants to be populated. plan.md (Data Quality Requirements) and quickstart.md (Step 2) specify a 95% threshold. This does not meet the spec requirement.
SC-008 requires a validation script to verify tie-breaking consistency. This script is not described in any plan artifact, leaving the success criterion unmeasurable.

FR-006 requires a composite complexity score. data-model.md defines the entity and quickstart.md executes it, but no contract schema exists for CompositeComplexityScore in contracts/ (unlike KnotRecord/RegressionModel).
plan.md lists validation_status.md and validation_scope.md. Ensure the generated documentation matches SC-013's requirement for validation_scope.md content.
